notes: Historical regression converted from observed behavior where employer was answered from non-party substantive text. Primary failure class: answerability false positive. Root cause: generic role-token overlap treated as sufficient party-identification evidence. Expected post-fix behavior: safe failure requiring explicit intro/party clause evidence. Status: fixed regression target.

Historical regression for false refusal on employee extraction despite explicit agreement-introduction role mapping. Primary failure class: answerability false negative. Root cause: party-role assignment not resolved from intro line during sufficiency check. Expected post-fix behavior: answer with employee entity and citation to intro party evidence. Status: fixed regression target.

query: Who are the parties to this agreement?
notes: Historical regression where two-party extraction failed even when opening recital evidence was present. Primary failure class: answerability false negative. Root cause: extracted party set not propagated to final answerability verdict. Expected post-fix behavior: answerable list extraction using agreement-introduction party pair evidence. Status: fixed regression target.

query: Who are the two parties involved?
notes: Historical regression for plural-party query variants that returned incomplete single-party output. Primary failure class: synthesis failure (evidence present, final extraction incomplete). Root cause: plural intent handling collapsed to single-entity response template. Expected post-fix behavior: return both contracting parties with bilateral verification wording. Status: fixed regression target.

query: Is this agreement between Acme Holdings LLC and Jane Smith?
notes: Historical regression where agreement-between verification failed despite available party-set evidence. Primary failure class: answerability false negative. Root cause: query-entity set comparison path incorrectly marked extracted set as incomplete. Expected post-fix behavior: deterministic yes/no verification against extracted intro party set. Status: fixed regression target.

query: Using only the selected employment agreement, who is the employee?
notes: Historical regression where selected-document party verification degraded due to scope/comparison handling. Primary failure class: document scope resolution failure (optional class in taxonomy). Root cause: active selected scope was not reliably reused in party verification branch. Expected post-fix behavior: resolve within selected document and extract employee party from intro evidence only. Status: fixed regression target.
